title: Build ecosystem diagnostic spine
goal: Stand up the shared diagnostic architecture for TransformBy10X, BizBuilders AI, and BizBot Mktng so lead capture, scoring, roadmap preview, and cross-site CTA routing have one reusable implementation plan.

inputs.notes: Use the tb10x-hub widget endpoint configuration as the routing/source map if verified. Prefer blueprint-clarity Diagnostic.tsx for diagnostic question/scoring patterns and ana-health-aura AssessmentFlow.tsx for lead-capture -> assessment -> results progression. Treat the remaining assessment examples as secondary pattern references. Canonical brand names are TransformBy10X, BizBuilders AI, and BizBot Mktng. Build toward one DiagnosticEngine with multiple configurations: TBTX Digital Fog Diagnostic -> BizBuilders AI Custom Roadmap -> BizBot Mktng Activate Growth System. Acceptance criteria: no scattered quiz logic, no dead-end CTAs, captured lead/session/answers/events, score/category generated, roadmap seed produced, mobile responsive flow, and routing events attributable by UTM source/campaign. Implementation must not rewrite brand voice, change offer names, deploy to production, modify DNS, add secrets, or alter payment configuration without explicit operator approval.

output_required: Executable implementation plan or code change set for a shared DiagnosticEngine plus per-site configuration map, data model, CTA routing, verification notes, and rollback notes.
